title: QuestCraft & Chill
description:
🌿 A Cozy Create-Driven Fabric Modpack (1.20.1)

This modpack focuses on Create-style automation, building, and quality-of-life improvements while keeping Minecraft feeling familiar and relaxed.
body:
A Cozy Create-Driven Fabric Modpack (1.20.1) for playing on QuestCraft

This modpack focuses on Create-style automation, building, and quality-of-life improvements while keeping Minecraft feeling familiar and relaxed. It’s built for Fabric 1.20.1 and designed for long-term survival worlds, not rushed progression.

You’ll find:

- 🔧 Mechanical automation with Create and compatible addons
  
- 🏠 Lots of decorative and building-focused mods
  
- 🌿 Small, vanilla-friendly world and wildlife enhancements
  
- ⚒️ Inventory, crafting, and usability improvements
  
- 📊 Strong performance optimizations (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore)

The pack is fully playable in VR with Vivecraft, but works just as well on a normal setup. Nothing is required, nothing is overwhelming — you can automate as much or as little as you want.

Best suited for players who enjoy building, light automation, and a smoother survival experience without turning Minecraft into a tech modpack.

_You might want to lower your draw distance down while joining the server if you are on Quest, otherwise it'll probably crash._

_Only tested on Quest 3._
